title: AssumptionSetRegistry
description: Schema for actuarial assumption sets used by the Actuary POC projection engine.

assumption_sets.description: List of assumption sets keyed by logical id.

AssumptionSet.description: One coherent set of assumptions for a product code (mortality, DSL, prefixes, governance metadata). This is the primary target for LLM-assisted extraction.

id.description: Stable identifier for this assumption set (e.g. 'wl-elite-v1', 'term23-2024q1').

product_code.description: PAS / product system code this assumption set applies to (e.g. 'WL-ELITE', 'TERM23-20').

description.description: Human-readable description of what this assumption set represents (source filing, key features, caveats).

dsl_file.description: Relative path to the DSL file under src/actuarypoc/dsl/examples/ that implements these assumptions (e.g. 'whole_life.yaml', 'term23_level_term.yaml').

actuarial_prefix.description: Optional MinIO prefix where the actuarial tables for this assumption set live (e.g. 'actuarial_tables_term23/').

status.description: Workflow status of this assumption set.

is_current.description: Whether this set is the current one for its product_code.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this assumption set was first created (UTC).

created_by.description: Free-form identifier of who/what created this set (e.g. 'llm-extractor', 'billy').

approved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this assumption set was approved as current (UTC).
